summary: Reject the Windows-only Chrome cookie v11 prefix on macOS and Linux instead of attempting AES-128-CBC decryption.
reason: Chrome v11 cookies use Windows App-Bound Encryption, not the macOS/Linux AES-128-CBC format; accepting the marker on non-Windows platforms could silently fail validation or emit garbage if encountered.
validated_outcome: Build and vet passed. The Chrome decrypter now reports a platform-specific App-Bound Encryption error for v11 cookies on macOS/Linux.
